description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf with a rich, dark brown wood grain finish. The unit features a sliding door on the front, revealing an open shelf space that contains a few stacked books. The top surface is flat and supports a small, square white planter with a green leafy plant. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a modern, mid-century appearance. The wood grain is visible on all surfaces, and the construction appears sturdy and well-crafted. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible handles or ornate details.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a sliding door, open shelf, and a potted plant on top. The unit features visible wood grain, short angled legs, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sliding door partially open, revealing books on the shelf and a potted plant on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood grain and the planter centered on the top surface.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the sliding door closed on the left, open shelf on the right, and the plant visible above.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden back and the plant on top, with no visible openings.
